what_changed: Added a Phase 08R Blender-to-Roblox FBX export pipeline for the existing Phase 08G GeneDynamics blend.
Exported four logical Roblox packages for gene activation, RNA processing cargo, mRNA pore export, and runtime anchors.
Added Open Cloud upload tooling that performs a dry run and records a blocked upload status when required credentials are missing.
Added Studio assembly and validation scripts that preserve Workspace.Nucleus_Model and target only Workspace.Nucleus_Model/GeneDynamics.
Added a Roblox GeneDynamicsController bound to transcription_mrna_export, transcribe_gene, export_mrna, and queue_updates.nuclear_mrna.
Updated the nucleus and whole-cell manifests to reflect Phase 08R export readiness and the credential blocker.
what_did_not_change: Phase 07R base nucleus anatomy was not rebuilt or replaced.
Phase 08G biology artwork was not regenerated.
Translation remains outside the nucleus; Phase 08R only visualizes transcription, mRNA processing/export, and handoff cues.
next_recommended_phase: Provide ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_API_KEY and ROBLOX_GROUP_ID, rerun the Phase 08R uploader, assemble the uploaded packages in Roblox Studio, then run edit-mode and play-mode validation.
